questions.question: 1 (a) A list of symbols and formulae is shown. Al 3+ CH 4 CO 2 Fe 3+ N 2 NO 2 O 2 O 2– Zn 2+ Answer the following questions about these symbols and formulae. Each symbol or formula may be used once, more than once or not at all. Which symbol or formula represents: (i) a compound which contributes to acid rain ....................................................................
